name: Md Mirazul Fakir Tools
description: A professional collection of utility tools including Voice to Text AI (English, Bangla, Hindi), Word Editor, PDF Editor, AI Emoji Remover, AI Article Generator, Text to Speech AI, Calculator, Number to Words, Picture to PDF, Word to PDF, PDF to Word, Excel to PDF, PDF to Excel, PPT to PDF, PDF to PPT, Scan to PDF, Merge PDF, Password Lock/Unlock PDF, Picture to Text (OCR), QR Code Scanner, QR Code Generator, HEIC to JPG/PNG Converter, and English to Bangla Translator.
